query: SELECT id, title, celexId FROM regulations WHERE title LIKE '%CSRD%' OR title LIKE '%PPWR%' OR title LIKE '%ESPR%' OR title LIKE '%EUDR%' OR title LIKE '%Waste Framework%' LIMIT 10;
